items.title: 太虚即气 EMERGING IN THE VOID
items.description: A contemporary experimental painting exhibition that explores the methodology and ontology of painting within an intercultural context
items.author: Letong Chen

items.title: 太虚即气 Jacobson Gallery
items.description: Pink's second solo exhibition. Location: Jacobson Gallery, Trinity Western University, Langley, BC, Canada. Time: February 25 - March 29, 2026. Artist Talk & Opening Reception: 7:30 - 8:00 pm, March 19, 2026.
items.author: Letong Chen
